title: The Settlement of the Affair by Giving of Allegiance to 'Ali b. Abi Talib
description: to 'Ali b. Abi Tali b According to Abu Ja'far [al-Tabari]: 'Ali was given allegiance on Friday, 25 Dhu'l-Hijjah (June 24), but people reckon it from the day that 'Uthman was killed.106 According to al-Sari (in writing)-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Sulayman b. ioi. I.e., Hakim; see p. 13, above. roe. Al-lujj. This was allegedly the name of al-Ashtar's sword (al-Zabidi, II, 93) rather than that of Hakim. 103. The Medinans, specifically those who had held back. 104. Forcibly like Talbah and al-Zubayr. Tabari's Arabic is not clear. io5.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
